title: Cloud Messaging (FCM)

sections.markdown: Firebase Cloud Messaging delivers notifications and data messages to Android, iOS and web. Each device gets a **registration token**; you send from your server (HTTP v1 API) to individual tokens, groups of tokens, or **topics**.

rows: OS displays automatically; app may not run code
Your app handles it; free-form JSON
Notification shown AND data delivered on tap

sections.markdown: Android Doze / iOS background restrictions mean **you cannot rely on background messages for silent work**. For guaranteed delivery, mark messages high-priority + use a foreground service on tap; for background sync, use WorkManager/BGTasks triggered from a data message.
Storing FCM tokens as identity. Tokens rotate (reinstall, restore, clear data). Refresh on `onTokenRefresh` and dedupe device rows by (userId, token) rather than trusting tokens as unique users.

Use HTTP v1 API (OAuth-signed) — legacy server keys are deprecated. On iOS you must configure APNs. For rich notifications, use notification images / notification channels (Android) and interruption levels (iOS).

flashcards.back: Notification = OS shows it automatically. Data = your app receives free-form JSON to handle.
Tokens rotate (reinstall, restore, clear data); handle onTokenRefresh.
HTTP v1 API with OAuth; legacy server keys are deprecated.

options: Trigger WorkManager/BGTasks from a data message
quiz.explain: OS background restrictions apply; schedule guaranteed work.

options: Per-install, may rotate — refresh on onTokenRefresh
quiz.explain: Don't treat tokens as durable user identity.

quiz.q: The modern FCM send API is…
quiz.explain: Legacy server key API is deprecated; use v1.

challenges.text: Receive a foreground notification and log it.
Handle a data message from background and update local state.
Subscribe/unsubscribe to topics and send targeted campaigns.
Design guaranteed background sync via data message → WorkManager job.

interviewQuestions: How do FCM tokens work; when do they rotate?
How do you handle background restrictions?
How would you send to a segment of users?
Legacy server key vs HTTP v1?
